name: Our World in Data
description: Our World in Data is a useful data surface inside Geopolitics.
whyUseIt: People in Geopolitics use Our World in Data to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using Our World in Data as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from Our World in Data.
